case_title: LIRA, JUAN vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FILED ON 1/30/95

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIRA, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY DOES ONE THROUGH FIFTY, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-16-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-20-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-27-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

AFTER FOLLOWING UP THIS CASE MONTHLY, PAYMENT WAS MADE BY CCSF TO PLTF ON 8/23/94; IN THE PREVIOUSLY SENT OUT RELEASE PAPERS WAS THE DISMISSAL TO BE FILLED OUT AND SENT IN BY THE DEFT WHEN CHECK WAS ISSUED. AS CCSF ATTY ROTHMAN HAS CLOSED OUT CASE BECAUSE MUNI RAILWAY WAS SETTLING CASE, DISM HAS
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIRA, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY DOES ONE THROUGH FIFTY, INCLUSIVE
ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-09-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIRA, JUAN
CORRESPONDENCE RECIEVED FROM STEPHENSON FAYE, PARALEGAL FROM BLACKMAN LEGAL GROUP THAT CASE HAS BEEN SETTLED.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-16-1994, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON MAY-17-1994 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(C) APPEARANCE ON FEB. 16, 1994 NOT REQUIRED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SELECT PANEL OF ARBITRATORS, REJECTION DATE APR-15-1994

NEVER BEEN FILED. PLTF "WILL SEE" IS THEY CAN SEND ANOTHER ONE TO COURT. EXECUTED COPY WAS SEND TO DEFT CCSF WITH THE PREVIOUSLY SENT RELEASE PAPERS BUT NEVER FILED. COURT STILL NEEDS THE ORIG DISM PAPERS ON FILE. WILL FOLLOW MONTHLY.
